posts.name: Andreea Tomescu
posts.cooked:
UiPath AgentHack 2025 champions are crowned!

UiPath AgentHack champions_1200x6271200×628 89.7 KB

Out of 400+ bold, creative, and wildly inventive submissions from more than 50 countries all over the world, the very best have risen to the top, and we’re beyond excited to share about who’s taking some awards home!

After three adrenaline-packed months of ideation, building, and live demos, UiPath AgentHack 2025 has its winners and below you’ll find the full honours list.

Why this matters:
Real-world impact: Every winning agent solves a production-grade problem, grab the use-cases and spin them up today.
Career rocket fuel: From $10K cash to UiPath certification vouchers, winners walk away with both funding and credibility.
Community momentum: Even if you didn’t win a prize, you now have a global network of agentic-automation builders ready to collaborate.

Winners:

Agent of the future prize: TrialIQ Agents

Enterprise Agents category prize winners:
• 1st Place: AIdMe
• 2nd Place: Rakshak AI
• 3rd Place: Accenture Agentic Squad

Agentic Testing category prize winners:
• 1st Place: Avalon
• 2nd Place: SoloPath
• 3rd Place: AI Controls

Special prize prize winners:
Best Cross-Platform Integration: LUMA - Turkish Airlines Technology
Impactful Agent: WelfareWise. ai WelfareWise.ai : Transforming European Welfare Narratives into Actionable Insights for Impact
Most useful feedback: DeepPrompt
Business ready agent: SoloPath
Best use of Agent Builder: OTOT Technologies
Innovative agentic workflow: Maestro Agentic Support Management
Community favorite: [Hackaholics] QuickAssist : TicketResolution_Agent - Agentic Automation / AgentHack - UiPath Community Forum
Rising star: [Rahul Dasari]( [#uipathcommunity #agenticautomation #newcomer #agenthack2025 #futureofwork #automation #innovation #hackathonjourney #rpa #digitaltransformation | Rahul Dasari | 505 comments]

Prize breakdown:

Agent of the future: Grand Prize, $10,000, Top overall build
Category 1st, $6,000, Best solution in each main track
Category 2nd, $4,000, Runner-up per track
Category 3rd, $2,500, Third place per track
Special awards, $2,000 each, Business-Ready, Innovative Workflow, Impactful, Advanced
Cross-category Bonuses, $1,500 each, Community Favorite, Rising Star, Best Agent Builder use, Best Cross-Platform Integration, Best Product Feedback

That’s over $50,000 in total rewards, not counting the UiPath certification vouchers each winning team takes home.

Dive into the use-cases:

Watch the teams present their projects here:
Enterprise Agents category
Agentic Testing category

All projects, winners and finalists, are now live in the AgentHack Use-case Repository. Save the ones that inspire you, and keep the conversation going in the dedicated forum thread.

Next step for every team (and supporter):
Turn your project into a community tutorial, a reusable Marketplace component, or a deep-dive blog post. Let’s maximise its value together; share it forward so others can build faster.

One last round of applause to every participant, voter, supporter, evaluator, and judge: you made this hackathon the epic showcase it is. The bar for agentic automation just got higher, and we can’t wait to see what you build next.

Happy automating, and see you at the next UiPath hackathon!

posts.name: Andreea Tomescu
posts.cooked:
During the initial announcement of the AgentHack 2025 Rising Star Award for newcomers, an incorrect LinkedIn post was referenced when determining the winner.
A subsequent review confirms that this
newcomer story post,currently at +557 likes and 492 comments, is the top-engagement entry and therefore the rightful winner.
